---
name: Bug report
about: Track a broken page, visual, binding, format, or model issue
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Area

- [ ] Executive Overview
- [ ] Income Statement
- [ ] Revenue Insights
- [ ] Cost Structure
- [ ] Balance Sheet
- [ ] Actual vs Budget
- [ ] Cashflow
- [ ] Semantic model
- [ ] Documentation

## Problem

Describe what is broken.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what should happen instead.

## Evidence

Include screenshot notes, error text, or affected visual/page IDs if known.

## Suspected Layer

- [ ] Report wiring
- [ ] Measure logic
- [ ] Table/relationship issue
- [ ] Compatibility object
- [ ] Formatting/layout
- [ ] Unknown

## Notes

Add any relevant context from `Project Memory`.
